name: CZ CELLxGENE
description: Single-cell dataset repository and interactive explorer from the Chan Zuckerberg Initiative.

name: Gene Expression Omnibus
description: Public functional genomics database.

name: PubChem
description: One of the largest chemical databases (compounds, genes, and proteins).

name: ChEMBL
description: Bioactive molecules with drug-like properties.

name: UniProt
description: Functional information on proteins.

name: AlphaFold Protein Structure Database
description: 3D protein structure predictions powered by AlphaFold.

name: Reactome
description: Expert-curated, peer-reviewed pathway database with detailed reaction mechanisms.

name: ENCODE
description: Encyclopedia of DNA Elements; regulatory and functional genomic elements across the genome.

name: Dependency Map (DepMap)
description: CRISPR-Cas9 screens in cancer cell lines.

name: MassBank
description: Open source databases and tools for mass spectrometry reference spectra.

name: name
description: description

name: ChEMBL
description: Manually curated database of bioactive molecules with drug-like properties, containing binding, functional, and ADMET data for millions of compounds.

name: UniProt
description: Comprehensive, high-quality resource for protein sequence and functional annotation, combining Swiss-Prot (manually reviewed) and TrEMBL.

name: Genomics of Drug Sensitivity in Cancer (GDSC)
description: Drug sensitivity measurements for ~1 000 human cancer cell lines tested against hundreds of compounds, paired with rich genomic characterization.

name: Scanpy
description: Scalable Python toolkit for analyzing single-cell gene expression data, covering preprocessing, visualization, clustering, and trajectory inference.

name: scGPT
description: Transformer-based foundation model pretrained on millions of single-cell transcriptomic profiles; supports cell-type annotation, perturbation response prediction, and multi-batch integration.

name: AlphaFold 3
description: Deep learning model from Google DeepMind that predicts the joint 3-D structure of proteins, nucleic acids, small molecules, and their complexes.

name: MoleculeNet
description: Curated collection of benchmark datasets for molecular machine learning, spanning quantum mechanics, physical chemistry, biophysics, and physiology.

name: Therapeutics Data Commons (TDC)
description: Unified resource of AI-ready datasets and learning tasks for therapeutic science, covering drug-target interaction, ADMET, clinical trials, and more.

name: Enformer
description: Transformer model that predicts gene expression and epigenetic tracks directly from long DNA sequences (200 kb context window).

name: ChEMBL Web Services
description: REST API providing programmatic access to the ChEMBL database for bioactive molecules, targets, assays, and compound ADMET properties.

name: Squidpy
description: Python library for the analysis and visualization of spatial molecular data, built on top of AnnData and Scanpy.

name: PrimeKG
description: Precision medicine knowledge graph integrating 20 high-quality biological databases across diseases, drugs, genes, and biological processes.
